title: TGL Transport Opens State-of-the-Art Warehouse Facility in Ho Chi Minh City
author: Corporate Communications
shortDescription: We are proud to announce the grand opening of our new 10,000 sqm logistics center in Ho Chi Minh City, enhancing our domestic distribution capabilities.
metaTitle: New Warehouse Opening in Ho Chi Minh City | TGL Transport News
metaDescription: TGL Transport expands its logistics infrastructure with a new 10,000 sqm warehouse facility in Ho Chi Minh City to support growing supply chain demands.
content:
## Expanding Our Footprint in Vietnam

**HO CHI MINH CITY, VIETNAM – July 1, 2026** – TGL Transport is thrilled to announce the official opening of our newest and most advanced logistics center, located strategically in the industrial heart of Ho Chi Minh City.

This major infrastructure investment represents a key milestone in our long-term growth strategy and our commitment to providing world-class supply chain solutions to our clients in Southeast Asia.

## Facility Highlights

The new facility spans over 10,000 square meters and is equipped with cutting-edge technology designed to optimize inventory management and accelerate fulfillment speed.

Key features of the new warehouse include:

*   **Advanced WMS (Warehouse Management System):** Real-time inventory tracking and automated order processing integration.
*   **Multi-Temperature Zones:** Capable of handling ambient, temperature-controlled, and cold-chain specific goods.
*   **High-Density Racking Systems:** Maximizing vertical space to efficiently store over 15,000 pallets.
*   **Eco-Friendly Operations:** Solar-powered roofing, LED motion-sensor lighting, and electric forklift fleets to align with our Green Logistics initiatives.

## Enhancing Last-Mile Delivery

“The strategic location of this new facility, close to major highways and Cat Lai Port, drastically reduces transit times for both inbound freight and outbound distribution,” said the CEO of TGL Transport. 

“This expansion allows us to bypass urban congestion and offer our e-commerce and retail clients faster, more reliable last-mile delivery services across the southern region.”

## Future Outlook

The Ho Chi Minh City warehouse is fully operational and accepting new client inventory immediately. This development is part of a broader network expansion plan, with further facility upgrades scheduled for Da Nang and Hanoi later this year.

For inquiries regarding warehouse space availability or fulfillment services, please contact our logistics solutions team.
